checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: 16 tests passed, including root search interface and dataset metadata endpoint contract tests; MDE parse check, sample index check, and fixture evaluation passed.

checks.name: wrangler deploy
checks.evidence: Deployed retail-search to https://retail-search.feroshjacob.workers.dev with version f4e361a8-686d-4059-9892-1a435ac5a8f2.

checks.name: public root UI
checks.evidence: Root URL returned HTML containing the search interface, Indexed Data panel, document count, example query 'wing pressure distribution', and Search Explain panel.

checks.name: public metadata endpoint
checks.evidence: /api/cranfield/meta returned 1,400 documents, 225 evaluation queries, 1,837 relevance judgments, searchable fields, topic hints, and example queries.

checks.name: public latest search alias
checks.evidence: /api/search returned live cranfield-v0 results for 'wing pressure distribution'; top result id 652; total hits 794; API latency 477 ms; OpenSearch took 5 ms.

checks.name: public latest explain alias
checks.evidence: /api/explain returned the generated OpenSearch query and top result id 652 for 'wing pressure distribution'; API latency 187 ms; OpenSearch took 4 ms.

blocked_or_skipped.name: browser visual screenshot
blocked_or_skipped.reason: The browser plugin reported no available browser instances. Served HTML and public HTTP behavior were still verified.

evidence_quality: Strong functional and public HTTP evidence for the interface and metadata. Visual screenshot evidence was unavailable because the browser connector had no browser instances.
